3288930.name: WILD Tactics Demo
3288930.description:
A WILD world needs WILD Tactics

WILD Tactics is a turn-based tactical strategy game where clear decisions, squad dynamics, and positioning decide every fight. Set in the animal-populated city of Clawville, you command a special task force taking on organized crime as the city slides toward collapse. Every mission is an operation. Plan the turn, execute the hit, and live with the consequences.

This demo lets you take on the first four story-driven missions and meet over five members of the WILD squad. You’ll get hands-on with the game’s core systems, from turn-based combat and squad positioning to character abilities and relationships that influence how your team performs in the field. Experiment with different squad lineups, adapt to changing enemy behavior, and see how choices shape how your team fights and reaches its objectives.

Mission relayed. Squad moving in.

The squad isn’t made of clean heroes. It’s a hand-picked crew of ex-detectives, ex-military, ex-mob, and ex-cons, each bringing a distinct tactical role, personality, and set of abilities to the field. Every operative comes with strengths, weaknesses, and baggage that shape how fights play out.

As they survive jobs together, relationships form under fire. Trust, rivalry, and bad blood affect performance in combat through situational buffs and debuffs, rewarding smart team composition and long-term planning.

One bad move and it all goes sideways

Good decisions keep your squad alive. Bad ones get punished fast. Where you move, who you leave exposed, and how you use your abilities have immediate consequences.

Use cover, control sightlines, and coordinate your squad to keep the situation under control. Step into the open or make a poor call, and the enemy will take advantage of it fast. There’s no safety net, but there’s no guesswork either. When a plan falls apart, you can see exactly what caused it.

When in doubt during a mission… shoot. Just make sure it’s the right shot.

High-pressure missions that demand adaptation

No two missions play the same. Different objectives, enemy behaviors, and environments force you to adjust your approach instead of relying on a single solution. Across 15 story-driven missions, you’ll need to read the situation and adapt on the fly. Each member of the WILD squad has an ace up their sleeve. Use it wisely.

Pressure builds as missions unfold. Enemy reinforcements arrive, resources run thin, and threats escalate, forcing tough decisions about positioning, abilities, and risk. Knowing when to push forward and when to pull back can be the difference between success and a wiped squad.

Every job leaves a mark.

Between missions, new skills, weapons, and equipment expand what each squad member can do in the field, opening up new tactical options rather than simply boosting stats. These upgrades reinforce distinct roles and give you more ways to approach future missions.

Progression also shapes how the squad works together. As characters fight side by side, their relationships evolve, influencing performance in combat and affecting how the team operates. Over time, your decisions strengthen both individual members and the dynamics between them.

It’s a harsh city. Good thing this squad bites back.

WILD Tactics takes place in the crime-ridden, animal-populated city of Clawville, with a bold ‘50s-inspired neon-noir aesthetic. A gritty crime story and a punchy original soundtrack drive the tension of every mission, blending dark themes with sharp style and a streak of dark humor.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
